cards.back: A field of study that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from the world.
A type of image that represents the amount of light that enters from an object, measured in terms of intensity.
The process by which an image is created or formed, including the collection of light, its measurement, and the representation of the image.
A measure of the amount of light that enters an object, or a value that represents the brightness of a pixel in an image.
The variation in the arrangement or distribution of pixels in an image, leading to differences in intensity or brightness.
